queries.question: What kitchen roles are there in each restaurant?
queries.sql: SELECT Kitchen_Roles.role_name  from Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles join Kitchen_Roles on Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.kitchen_role_id = Kitchen_Roles.role_id join Restaurants on Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.restaurant_id = Restaurants.id   GROUP BY Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.kitchen_role_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.restaurant_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Restaurants)

queries.question: What kitchen roles are there in each restaurant?
queries.sql: select restaurants.name , kitchen_roles.role_name from Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles join Kitchen_Roles on Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.kitchen_role_id = Kitchen_Roles.role_id join Restaurants on Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles.restaurant_id = Restaurants.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?role_name WHERE {
  ?restaurants_kitchen_roles a :Restaurants_Kitchen_Roles .
  ?kitchen_roles a :Kitchen_Roles .
  ?restaurants_kitchen_roles p:hasKitchen_Roles ?kitchen_roles .
  ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurants_kitchen_roles p:hasRestaurants ?restaurants .
  ?restaurants p:name ?name .
  ?kitchen_roles p:role_name ?role_name .
}
